home.title: Smart Health Diagnosis
home.subtitle: Your Personal Health AI Advisor
home.description: Leveraging large language model technology to provide intelligent health report analysis, personalized health plans, health Q&A, and smart conversations for more scientific and efficient health management.

report.title: Report Analysis
report.desc: Upload medical reports, lab results, or health images for AI-powered analysis with professional insights and health recommendations.

plan.title: Plan Generator
plan.desc: Fill in your health information and let AI create tailored diet, exercise, and lifestyle management plans.

chat.title: Smart Chat
chat.desc: Chat in real-time with a health AI advisor to get answers to your health questions and professional guidance.

quiz.title: Health Quiz
quiz.desc: Test your health knowledge through fun quizzes with AI-generated questions and instant scoring.

ai.title: AI Powered
ai.desc: Deep health data interpretation based on advanced LLM technology

privacy.title: Privacy Safe
privacy.desc: API Key stored locally, data not uploaded to cloud

professional.title: Professional
professional.desc: Scientific health knowledge system, evidence-based results

safety.title: Safety Notice
safety.desc: This tool analyzes health information using AI technology. Results are for reference only and cannot replace professional medical diagnosis or treatment. Please seek medical attention promptly for serious health issues. Your API key is stored only in your local browser; we do not collect or store any of your health data.

landing.heroDesc: Leveraging large language model technology to provide intelligent health report analysis, personalized health plans, health Q&A, and smart conversations for more scientific and efficient health management.
landing.coreFeaturesDesc: Four AI health services to comprehensively protect your healthy life
landing.ctaDesc: Register an account and experience AI-driven health analysis. No complex configuration needed, start in a few steps.
landing.safetyDesc: This tool analyzes health information using AI technology. Results are for reference only and cannot replace professional medical diagnosis or treatment. Please seek medical attention promptly for serious health issues. Your API key is stored only in your local browser; we do not collect or store any of your health data.
landing.footer: Cloud Health | For reference only, not a substitute for professional medical advice

quiz.commentExcellent: Excellent! Your health knowledge is very rich, keep it up!
quiz.commentGood: Good job! You have a good understanding of health knowledge, with room for improvement.
quiz.commentFair: Not bad! Consider learning more about health to improve your health literacy.
quiz.commentNeedsWork: Keep going! We recommend learning some basic health knowledge and taking care of your body.

errorBoundary.title: Page Error

apiConfig.title: AI Configuration

apiConfig.info2: Config is stored locally in browser only (AES-GCM encrypted), not uploaded to server

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage registered users, view, edit and delete users

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update user role, please retry
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete user, please retry

upgradeConfirm.title: Grant Admin Privileges
upgradeConfirm.message: You are about to upgrade this user to admin. Please confirm the following:
upgradeConfirm.risk1: Admins can manage all users, including viewing, editing, and deleting users
upgradeConfirm.risk2: Admins can modify system configuration, affecting global platform behavior
upgradeConfirm.risk3: You can always downgrade an admin back to a regular user later

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.subtitle: View platform usage logs and admin audit records
dataManagement.clearUsageWarning: All usage log data will be permanently deleted.
dataManagement.clearAuditWarning: All audit log data will be permanently deleted.

systemConfig.title: System Config
systemConfig.subtitle: Manage platform runtime parameters and global switches
systemConfig.noConfigDesc: Config items will appear here after first setup

groups.siteDesc: Customize site appearance and display content
groups.switchesDesc: Control the enablement of core platform features
groups.securityDesc: Manage login security and request limits

maintenanceEnable.title: Enable Maintenance Mode
maintenanceEnable.message: All regular users will immediately lose access to the platform. Only admins can continue using it. Are you sure?

maintenanceDisable.title: Disable Maintenance Mode
maintenanceDisable.message: The platform will return to normal access for all users. Are you sure?

registrationDisable.title: Disable Registration
registrationDisable.message: New users will not be able to register accounts. Are you sure?

registrationEnable.title: Enable Registration
registrationEnable.message: New users will be able to register accounts normally. Are you sure?

activeWarnings.maintenance: ⚠️ Maintenance mode is active. All regular users cannot access the platform.
activeWarnings.registrationClosed: ⚠️ Registration is closed. New users cannot sign up.

descriptions.max_requests_per_day: Maximum AI requests per user per day, 0 for unlimited
descriptions.maintenance_mode: When enabled, regular users cannot access the platform
descriptions.enable_registration: When disabled, new user registration is blocked
descriptions.max_request_body_size: Maximum allowed API request body size in bytes, default 10MB
descriptions.max_login_failures: Account will be temporarily locked after this many consecutive failures
descriptions.account_lockout_seconds: Auto-unlock wait time after account is locked
descriptions.metrics_sample_rate: Sampling ratio for successful requests, between 0 and 1, 0.1 = 10%

maintenance.title: System Maintenance
maintenance.desc: The platform is currently under maintenance. Please check back later. Thank you for your patience.

registrationClosed.title: Registration Closed
registrationClosed.desc: New user registration is currently suspended. Please contact the administrator if you have any questions.

chat.welcomeDesc: I am your AI health advisor. I can answer health-related questions, provide wellness advice, and explain medical knowledge. How can I help you?
chat.placeholder: Type your question and press Enter to send...
chat.disclaimer: AI-generated content is for reference only and cannot replace professional medical advice

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Quick start guide for smart chat
help.send: Type your health question in the input box below and press Enter to send
help.context: Supports multi-turn conversations; AI will answer based on context
help.clear: Click "Clear Chat" to remove all chat history
help.disclaimer: AI-generated content is for reference only and cannot replace professional medical advice

clearConfirm.title: Clear all conversations?
clearConfirm.desc: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This action cannot be undone.

health-advisor.name: Health Advisor
health-advisor.systemPrompt: You are a professional health advisor who can answer various health questions and provide scientific health advice. Note: your advice is for reference only and cannot replace professional medical diagnosis.

nutritionist.name: Nutritionist
nutritionist.systemPrompt: You are a senior nutritionist specialized in meal planning, nutritional supplements, weight loss, and muscle gain guidance. Please provide personalized dietary advice based on the user's specific situation.

fitness-coach.name: Fitness Coach
fitness-coach.description: Exercise training and fitness program guidance
fitness-coach.systemPrompt: You are a professional fitness coach skilled in creating training plans, guiding exercise techniques, and preventing sports injuries. Please provide appropriate exercise advice based on the user's physical condition and goals.

errors.heightInvalid: Please enter a valid height (50-250 cm)
errors.weightInvalid: Please enter a valid weight (20-300 kg)
errors.targetDateInvalid: Target date must be today or later

fileUploader.dragTitle: Click or drag file here to upload
fileUploader.dragDesc: Supports PNG, JPG, PDF, TXT, max {{maxSize}}MB
fileUploader.pdfHint: PDF files cannot be parsed directly. For more accurate analysis, please upload in text format (.txt) or as a screenshot (.png/.jpg).

errors.readFailed: Failed to read file, please retry
errors.pdfEmpty: No text content extracted from PDF. The file may be a scanned document or image-based PDF

quizPanel.question: Question {{idx}}
quizPanel.empty: Click the button above to generate questions

backup.subtitle: Create and manage system backup tasks
backup.empty: No backup tasks yet. Click the button above to create one.

form.name: Backup Name
form.encryptionPasswordHint: If set, this password will be required for download and restore

errors.scopeRequired: Please select at least one backup content

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Backup Task

validation.scopeRequired: At least one backup content must be selected
validation.retentionMin: Retention days must be at least 1
validation.invalidBackupFormat: Invalid backup data format: missing _meta field

backup.restoreDialogDesc: Select a backup file to restore. If the backup is encrypted, please enter the decryption password.
backup.downloadDialogDesc: Enter an encryption password to encrypt the backup file. Leave empty for unencrypted download.
backup.recordsSubtitle: View execution records of all backup tasks
